sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61079" key="kurtau/xhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυρτ-αύχην</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <sense id="n61079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bulging neck</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5.70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
